Composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and complete the backend code in main.py
- Ensure all routing functions correctly render the required HTML templates.
- Verify that the 'templates' directory exists at the root of the Flask project and contains all necessary HTML template files.
- Fix any path or naming issues that prevent Flask from locating templates such as 'dashboard.html', 'article_catalog.html', and 'article_details.html'.
- Maintain all existing backend functionalities including reading/writing local text files for articles, bookmarks, comments, trending data, and categories.
- Ensure the Dashboard page is the landing page at route '/'.
- Coordinate with Programmer 2 to confirm template file names and locations match backend render_template calls.
Composition.Programmer 2:
Develop and place all frontend HTML templates in the 'templates/' directory
- Complete all frontend HTML templates corresponding to the nine pages defined in the requirements document  dashboard.html, article_catalog.html, article_details.html, bookmarks.html, write_comment.html, trending.html, category.html, search_results.html.
- Ensure all templates are correctly named and saved in the 'templates' folder at the root of the Flask project so that Flask can locate them.
- Implement UI elements with specified IDs and types as per the requirements document.
- Ensure all URLs in the frontend code use backend routes, not direct HTML file names.
- Ensure the Dashboard page is the landing page.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to confirm template file names and locations match backend render_template calls.

Composition.Programmer 1:
Test whether the website can be accessed through local port 5000. In this test, you only need to test whether the first page of the website can be accessed through the local 5000 port.
Task 2  Test whether the first page of the website loads correctly and whether basic navigation works based on the example data provided in the Task.
Task 3  Test the elements and integrity of all pages. This includes verifying the presence and correctness of the following elements on each page

background_prompt: EvoMAC is a software company powered by multiple intelligent agents, such as chief executive officer, chief human resources officer, chief product officer, chief technology officer, etc, with a multi-agent organizational structure and the mission of 'changing the digital world through programming'.
